# skilltap

> Personal control plane for Codex and Claude Code marketplaces, plugins, skills, and shared instructions.

## Guide

- [What is skilltap?](https://skilltap.dev/guide/what-is-skilltap): Product purpose and boundaries
- [Getting Started](https://skilltap.dev/guide/getting-started): Install, inspect, enable, adopt, and synchronize
- [Managing Environments](https://skilltap.dev/guide/managing-environments): Adopt, plan, and reconcile native resources
- [Shared Instructions](https://skilltap.dev/guide/instructions): Keep AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md aligned
- [Updates and Daemon](https://skilltap.dev/guide/updates): Track revisions and apply safe updates

## Reference

- [CLI Reference](https://skilltap.dev/reference/cli): Commands, selectors, output, and exit codes
- [State and Configuration](https://skilltap.dev/reference/state): Policy, scoped inventory, provenance, and managed artifacts

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nklisch/skilltap): Source code, issues, and releases
- [Full documentation](https://skilltap.dev/llms-full.txt): All current pages as one Markdown file
